ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2019-20) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the season's logo */,
  "current_week" INTEGER /* Current match week of the season */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the season (e.g., 'ongoing', 'completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league result entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the team in the league */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of games drawn by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of games lost by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals for - goals against) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification or relegation outcome for the team */,
  "goals_scored_home" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team at home */,
  "goals_scored_away" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team away */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "biggest_win" INTEGER /* Largest margin of victory */,
  "biggest_loss" INTEGER /* Largest margin of defeat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_results_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "assistant_referee_1" TEXT /* Name of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee_2" TEXT /* Name of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official" TEXT /* Name of the fourth official */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., 'completed', 'postponed') */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "crowd_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the crowd (e.g., 'positive', 'negative') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "total_goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the team */,
  "total_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the team */,
  "total_red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the team */,
  "total_shots" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the team */,
  "total_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total shots on target by the team */,
  "total_fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the team */,
  "total_fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Total fouls suffered by the team */,
  "total_corners" INTEGER /* Total corners taken by the team */,
  "total_offsides" INTEGER /* Total offsides by the team */,
  "total_passes" INTEGER /* Total passes made by the team */,
  "accurate_passes" INTEGER /* Total accurate passes made by the team */,
  "total_tackles" INTEGER /* Total tackles made by the team */,
  "successful_tackles" INTEGER /* Total successful tackles made by the team */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Average possession percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, fan) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'view', 'download') */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was appointed */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date the manager left the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "previous_clubs" TEXT /* Previous clubs managed by the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_managers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in meters) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in kilograms) */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists_made" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
